content.question: Which is main the purpose of Application Software?

options.text: To teach the user how to use the Operating System
To send instructions to the CPU
To manage processes on the Operating System
To solve a specific problem or perform specific tasks

content.question: Which of the following is not an operating system?
True or False: There must be an operating system for the user to interact with the computer.
How does the Operating System find an Application?

options.text: The user must enter the location
They are built into the Operating System when it is installed

content.question: Which of the following is the purpose of a Programming Language?

options.text: To execute code written by a programmer
To provide a human readable syntax that can be compiled into machine code
To replace the need for hardware in a Computer System
To store data permanently without any hardware support
